name: the primitive type called ash

phase_0.boundary_condition: The finite depth limit of the stratified manifold

VINIT.justification: The raw data before any simplicial structure or dimensionality is assigned.

TANCH.justification: The terminal geometric constraint that contains all sub-simplices within the ash structure.

AFWD.justification: The forward morphism that maps a simplex to its higher-dimensional embedding.

AREV.justification: The reverse morphism that collapses a simplex into a lower-dimensional projection.

CLINK.justification: The sequential composition of simplices into a connected complex.

IMSCRIB.justification: The identity operation verifying that a simplex is consistent with its own geometric definition.

FSPLIT.justification: The branching of a single simplex into multiple smaller, distinct sub-simplices.

FFUSE.justification: The reconstitution of the original simplex volume from its subdivided components.

EVALT.justification: The affirmative state where the triangulation satisfies the required local flatness.

EVALF.justification: The negative state where the triangulation fails to form a valid manifold.

ENGAGR.justification: A state where a point exists on the boundary of two distinct strata simultaneously.

IFIX.justification: The permanent fixation of the abstract simplicial complex into a specific coordinate space.

phase_3.void_description: pre-geometric state with no defined connectivity or dimension
phase_3.true_description: valid simplicial complex satisfying the ash finite-depth constraint
phase_3.false_description: invalid triangulation or infinite recursive depth violation
phase_3.both_description: a point of intersection between strata where multiple dimensionalities overlap

steps.domain_action: compose edges into a closed loop
branch the loop into potential interior faces
confirm the face satisfies the ash finite-depth limit
record the 2-simplex in the simplicial registry
join the faces to reconstitute the original loop boundary
project the 2-simplex back to its 1-simplex boundary for verification
hold the boundary state as both edge and face-limit
seal the complex at the maximal stratification depth

phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — the geometric information is preserved through the subdivision and union cycle

notes: Auto-designed from: the primitive type called ash
